title: halimium halimifolium subsp. lasiocalycinum
intro: Halimium halimifolium subsp. lasiocalycinum, also known as rockrose, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Cistaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations and promoting wound healing. It can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
